info.description: Single centred image with a caption underneath. Use this for any single photo that needs to sit in its own section.

image.description: The image. Any aspect ratio is fine. Recommended at least 1200px wide.

caption.description: Caption shown beneath the image (optional). Short and italic by default. Can include credit line + a sentence of context.

max_image_width.description: How wide the image displays. Narrow = ~600px (good for portraits), Medium = ~900px, Wide = ~1200px, Full = edge to edge.

style.description: Optional background colour, padding for this section. (Width is set by max_image_width above.)
